sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES Renegade

special_mechanics.name: Running
special_mechanics.description: Player can run by pressing joystick left or right twice quickly. Running punch and flying kick variants available.

special_mechanics.name: Jump Kick
special_mechanics.description: While jumping, pressing either attack button performs a jump kick towards that direction.

special_mechanics.name: Collar Grab
special_mechanics.description: After stunning enemies with punches or kicks, player can approach for collar grab and kick repeatedly or perform shoulder throw.

special_mechanics.name: Ground Pummel
special_mechanics.description: Pressing down over fallen enemy allows player to sit on them and pummel with front attack button.

special_mechanics.name: Directional Movement
special_mechanics.description: Eight-way joystick allows horizontal and vertical movement around arena, with isometric perspective. Can move towards or away from background.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and control scheme qualitatively but provide no quantitative physics parameters. No ROM analysis or precise movement values documented. Game features 8-way movement with running and jumping mechanics typical of 1987 NES beat-em-ups.
